column1: # Golden corpus — the executable spec of grammar v1 (English).
# Format: space-separated tokens "lemma:POS" <TAB> expected DEFAULT candidate.
# "CONCAT" = no pattern may match; the only candidate is the concat fallback.
# Change lines only with linguistic justification in the PR (docs/grammar-v1.md).

column2: I want to eat the pizza
